name: Texas Style Chili
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Monterey Jack cheese for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the steak cubes in oil in a Dutch oven until browned on all sides.
2. Remove the steaks to a bowl and set aside.
3. Reserve 1/2 cup of onions in the pan, cover with foil and set aside.
4. Add remaining onions, peppers, and garlic to the drippings in the pan over medium heat.
5. Cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add more oil if necessary.
6. Return the meat to the pan, add diced tomatoes and their liquid, and remaining ingredients (except cheese).
7. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 1 1/2 hours or until the meat is fork tender, stirring occasionally.
8. Spoon chili into a large bowl. Sprinkle cheese on top for garnish.
9. Pass reserved onions to sprinkle over each serving.
